rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Siemens SIDIS Prime
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/20
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '1.0.2.5'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*commonmark-rules.js*'
            - '*console.log*'
            - '*parse.js*'
            - '*qs.parse*'
            - '*result.a.length*'
            - '*server.fs*'
            - '*server.fs.deny*'
            - '*server.host*'
            - '*utils.combine*'
            - '*www.siemens.com*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 1.0.2.5 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Siemens_SIDIS_Prime"; sid:1811458; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 1.0.2.5 any (msg:"CDB APEX Siemens_SIDIS_Prime"; sid:7468498; rev:1;)
